You lose half your money every day now that being said there are businesses around all do this all day long and Make a ton of money by spending a thousand dollars or ten thousand dollars a day in advertising and the opening sale makes them only $500 how very simply life of the customer so while they only might make five hundred dollars in the opening Transaction and lose half their money if they have a great product and at least a future business Then they can make ten thousand dollars over the first year or twenty or hundred thousand over the life of the customer So it's a great exchange, but remember cash flow wise You got to be very very careful that your marketing activities are at least somewhat offset by short-term income Or else you could have all the long-term profits of the world, but you're broke You're constantly broke because you've negative cash flow the big companies Yeah, you can finance it with money raised on Wall Street before the average person here Which you are okay success oriented person who wants to get rich remember you know You get me recognizant that marketing is not just about bringing leads in it's bringing leads in a cost effective manner End of discussion because this is not a marketing discussion I will cover marketing funnels because I'm an expert at I got one of the top-performing funnels in the world right now So I know everything about it. You said that number could be two to 300 day easily But we'll use a hundred because it's a round number right now when you make a hundred dials You're not gonna speak to let's assume you're calling businesses, right of those Dove of those um dials you might only actually speak to 50 people 50 people Right because there's answering machines.
